old_claim.note: Pottery Wheel provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: The reconstructed composite roof system depends on fired architectural ceramics, not vessel throwing on a pottery wheel.

source_shape.source_locator: Results and dated context: reconstruct composite tile roofs at Qiaocun from strata concentrated around 2400-2200 BCE in the earliest Longshan phase of the site.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Qiaocun preserves the earliest known composite tiled roofs in contexts dated about 2400-2200 BCE.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The scoped evidence establishes the milestone without the removed dependency. The reconstructed composite roof system depends on fired architectural ceramics, not vessel throwing on a pottery wheel.

ontology_before: kiln_fired_roof_tiles treated pottery_wheel as a direct causal prerequisite.
ontology_after: kiln_fired_roof_tiles is scoped to the directly evidenced mechanism and no longer claims pottery_wheel as a prerequisite.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed and locked by graph invariant 2026-07-12-structural-accuracy-batch: kiln_fired_roof_tiles no longer directly depends on pottery_wheel.
would_reject_if: A reliable source demonstrates that every implementation within the current kiln_fired_roof_tiles scope technically requires pottery_wheel.
short_reason: The reconstructed composite roof system depends on fired architectural ceramics, not vessel throwing on a pottery wheel.
